Groundbreaking Ceremony of Student Social Center Held

08.06.2022

The groundbreaking ceremony of the Ibn Haldun University Complex Student Social Center was held on Monday, June 6th. Ibn Haldun University Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. Dr. İrfan Gündüz, Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and other members of the Board of Trustees attended the ceremony.

The groundbreaking ceremony of the Ibn Haldun University Complex Student Social Center was held on Monday, June 6th. Ibn Haldun University Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. Dr. İrfan Gündüz, Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and other members of the Board of Trustees attended the ceremony.

With the Student Social Center, whose foundation was laid within the scope of the 2nd phase of the complex which is still under construction, Ibn Haldun University will have a new social reinforcement that will meet the social and cultural needs of its students and members.

Student Social Center will serve the members of Ibn Haldun University with its many different units; from movie theaters to student club rooms, from art and music workshops to event and game halls, from book and technology market to cafe. The center is planned to be put into service within a year.
